description: Pipeline & Gas Journal (P&GJ) is an active trade magazine currently published monthly by Gulf Energy Information. Founded in 1859, it publishes the latest news, technology and trends in the midstream sector of the international oil and gas industry. Each issue features original, moderately technical articles that cover the issues and challenges of day-to-day energy pipeline operations, as well as the specific solutions employed to solve situations . It also contains industry news and practical information of interest to midstream professionals, along with product reviews, a calendar of relevant events, and the latest technological advances in the pipeline and gas utility industries . Occasional special-focus issues are dedicated to a particular topic of interest .  The Internet Archive Collection contains microfilm published between 1859 and 2015. Pipeline & Gas Journal can be found online at: https://pgjonline.com/ The ISSN is 0032-0188 Publication History: American Gas Engineering Journal 0096-4387 Which was formerly (until 1921) USA United States American Gas Journal 0096-4409 (1859-1970) USA United States American Gas Light Journal 0096-4395 (until 1917) USA United States Petroleum Engineer, Oil and Gas Pipelining Edition   Which was formerly (until 1956) USA United States Pipe Line News 0032-0153 Which was formerly (until 1974) USA United States Pipeline (Houston) 0148-4443 Incorporates (1928-1990) USA United States Pipeline Engineer 0096-8293 Formed by the merger of (19??-1970) USA United States
